text: Most often the diazepam got me to sleep fairly quickly but did not last the whole night through. The liquid capsules were then superceded by tablets which usually took about twice as long to kick in. ie, 40 mins instead of 20. The benefit was there if I was unable to sleep otherwise but a benzo sleep is not natural and feels different to real sleep. Twitching nerves for several days afterward. Difficulty sleeping. Taking a pill to get to sleep.
